title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Reliance Digital

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Reliance Digital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Reliance Digital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
